items.title: Trump says he will raise global tariff rate from 10% to 15%
items.author: Reuters
items.content:

items.title: Caring for your Olympic medal, explained
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Years of hard training and sacrifice, participation in the Olympics and the lifelong dream that comes true with a medal: a symbol of glory that, unlike the achievement itself, can deteriorate over time.

For this reason, the United States Olympic and Paralympic Museum decided to bring to Milan a medal care kit, making it available to any member of Team USA who has won a medal, past or present, so they can take care of their shining piece of history.

The kit, explained Lindsay Flanagan Huban, Chief Content Officer of the United States Olympic and Paralympic Museum, contains the same supplies used in the museum in the U.S. to preserve metals, including acid‑free boxes, tissue paper, white cotton gloves, lint‑free wipes, and instructions on what to use and what not to use on the medals.
#OlympicMedal #Olympics #Paralympics #Medal #MilanoCortina2026 @usopmuseum

items.title: Meet Nazgul, the unlikely star of the Winter Olympics
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>When the Varesco family headed off to watch the biathlon at the Winter Olympics on February 18, they left their two-year-old Czechoslovakian wolfdog Nazgul locked in his kennel at home in Tesero. In their absence, Nazgul became the most unlikely star of the Milano Cortina Games after escaping the house and wandering onto the nearby Olympic cross-country course before sprinting down the finishing straight alongside the skiers. 
 
#Dog #WinterOlympics #Biathlon #Olympics #Skiing

items.title: UPDATE - Trump tariffs, Iran, Andrew photo and Canada-US hockey
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>The Supreme Court’s move against Donald Trump’s tariff powers sets off a $175 billion tariff dispute now headed back to the trade court. U.S. officials consider Iran strike options. Reuters photographer Phil Noble talks how he took the viral Andrew Mountbatten‑Windsor car shot. Plus, Canada and the United States brace for a blockbuster Olympic ice hockey final.








*This podcast has been updated to include the latest announcement of a temporary tariff increase to 15%.

items.title: Nick Baumgartner’s hustle behind financing his Olympic dream
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>American snowboarding Olympian Nick Baumgartner’s inspirational story resonates with many at the Winter Games — making it to the top of their game didn’t always come easy, financially.
 
Baumgartner, who won a gold medal in the 2022 Games in Beijing at age 40, told Reuters at Milano Cortina it took years of pouring concrete and unemployment checks before his Olympic dream became a reality.
 
#olympics #milanocortina2026 #wintergames #winterolympics #italy
